findings.message: Use digest to pin versions of base images. Image tags are mutable and can be updated to point to different images, making builds non-reproducible. Pin the image version using its SHA256 digest (e.g., 'FROM ubuntu:20.04@sha256:abc123...') to ensure you always get the exact same image and guarantee reproducible builds.

Use digest to pin versions of base images. Image tags are mutable and can be updated to point to different images, making builds non-reproducible. Pin the image version using its SHA256 digest (e.g., 'FROM ubuntu:20.04@sha256:abc123...') to ensure you always get the exact same image and guarantee reproducible builds.
